# Elderly Care Facility Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-elderly-care-elderly-care-facility
**Vertical slug:** elderly-care
**VN-ID:** VN-HLT-002
**Niche family:** NF-HLT-ELD (standalone)
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Elderly care is an emerging sector in Nigeria, driven by urbanisation reducing traditional extended-family care. Facilities like Golden Care Nigeria (Abuja) and Sunrise Senior Living serve the growing upper and middle class. Most families are unfamiliar with formal elderly care — trust, dignity, and cultural sensitivity are paramount. Costs range from ₦150,000–₦600,000/month. Diaspora Nigerians (UK, US, Canada) are a significant target for parents left in Nigeria. WhatsApp video tours are a strong sales tool.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Diaspora daughter Chioma, 38, UK**: Mother in Lagos needs professional care. Needs WhatsApp video tour, FMOH credentials, CRB-cleared staff proof, and ₦ pricing via WhatsApp.
- **Adult son Emeka, 44, Lagos**: Father had a stroke. Needs residential physiotherapy, medical supervision, and cultural sensitivity (no ethnic food restrictions). WhatsApp enquiry.
- **Social worker from LSSH, 35**: Refers elderly clients needing care placement. Needs professional facility profile and FMOH compliance documentation.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (dignity-first, warm, professional), WhatsApp tour request CTA, care programmes summary, FMOH/MDCN trust strip, testimonials (diaspora families)
- **About**: Facility story, care director profile, MDCN-licensed nursing staff, FMOH approval, facility photos
- **Services**: Residential care, day care, specialised dementia/stroke care — ₦ monthly packages
- **Contact**: WhatsApp virtual tour booking, family enquiry form (NDPR-compliant), facility location, visiting hours

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Dignified, warm, professional, family-reassuring. "Dignity at Every Age", "FMOH Approved", "CRB-Cleared Carers", "Diaspora Family Trusted" language. Never clinical coldness. Primary CTA: "Book a WhatsApp Tour". Secondary: "Request Care Assessment".

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- FMOH facility approval
- MDCN-licensed nurses/clinical lead
- CRB-cleared staff certification
- CAC registration
- Fire safety and first aid certification
- Diaspora family testimonials
- NDPR compliance for resident data

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Carer helping elderly Nigerian man walk — garden, warm light, dignity-first
2. Elder woman reading or praying in comfortable room — Nigerian decor, dignified
3. Group activity — gentle exercise, arts, or music for residents
4. Dietitian with elder reviewing meal plan — culturally appropriate Nigerian food
5. Family visit — adult child with parent in facility garden, warm reunion
6. Facility exterior — clean, welcoming, well-maintained signage
7. Virtual tour WhatsApp video screenshot — diaspora family on screen

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] FMOH facility approval displayed
- [ ] MDCN-licensed staff credentials shown
- [ ] CRB-cleared staff policy noted
- [ ] CAC registration
- [ ] NDPR consent for resident/family data
- [ ] Fire safety certificate
- [ ] Safeguarding/elder abuse prevention policy stated

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp tour request CTA prominent
- [x] FMOH/MDCN trust signals
- [x] ₦ monthly package pricing
- [x] Diaspora family audience addressed
- [x] Nigerian cultural context (food, language, prayer)
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on family enquiry form
